query:
SELECT u.name, u.email, up.assignedBusinessLines, up.territories 
FROM users u 
LEFT JOIN userProfiles up ON u.id = up.userId 
WHERE u.name LIKE '%Brett%' OR u.name LIKE '%Dan%';

SELECT id, name, productLine, applicationTags, matchCount, isActive 
FROM collateralItems 
WHERE name LIKE 'Sykes%' 
ORDER BY id;
